contents.summary: As a user, I want to enable Azure Image Tagging and set processing limits in MCP settings
contents.description:
This story covers the core configuration for switching to Azure Image Tagging.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
Given I am in the Asset Intelligence section of MCP settings
When I enable 'Enable Image Tagging (Azure)'
Then Imagga image tagging is disabled and Azure is used
And I can configure 'Azure Image Processing Limit (Images) (per billing cycle)'

contents.summary: As a user, I want existing Imagga image-tagging configurations and history migrated to Azure
contents.description:
This story ensures continuity of image tagging data when switching providers.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
Given Imagga image tagging was previously used
When Azure image tagging is enabled (can be mocked for development/testing)
Then all existing Imagga image-tagging configurations and usage history are successfully migrated to Azure

contents.summary: As an admin, I want billing and quota tracking updated for Azure image processing usage
contents.description:
This story ensures accurate financial and usage tracking for the new Azure service.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
Given Azure image tagging is active
When images are processed via Azure
Then billing and quota tracking accurately reflect Azure image processing usage

contents.summary: As a user, I want the weekly Asset Intelligence report to include Q/A/R data and be cleaned up
contents.description:
This story updates the core content and naming of the weekly report.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
Given the `closed_captions_activation_report_` is generated
When the report is updated
Then it includes Question / Answer / Rating data
And the report is renamed to `weekly_asset_intelligence_report`
And Dev Server report entries (e.g. dcfprod, rtsprod, dev018, dev015, dpctest, dcftest, dev016, dev003, dev027, dev026, rtstest, macsprod, etc.) are removed

contents.summary: As a user, I want historical data migration for the Asset Intelligence report
contents.description:
This story ensures that past data is correctly integrated into the new report structure.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
Given the `weekly_asset_intelligence_report` is generated
When historical data exists
Then historical data is correctly migrated and included in the report

contents.summary: As a user, I want backward compatibility for the Asset Intelligence report
contents.description:
This story ensures that older systems or consumers can still interpret the report.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
Given the `weekly_asset_intelligence_report` is generated
When older systems consume the report
Then the report maintains backward compatibility with existing consumers

contents.summary: PB - As a user, I want to move a sub-page to become a standalone Smart Page via drag-and-drop (Core UI/UX)
contents.description:
This story implements the fundamental UI/UX for reordering Smart Pages.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
Given I am in Page Builder editing mode
When I drag a sub-Page from the Navigation Panel
And drop it as a standalone Page (Parent)
Then I see the updated order and hierarchy in the Navigation Panel
And the reordered Navigation Panel structure persists across editing and viewing until updated again

contents.summary: PB - As a user, I want child references, linked content, and dependencies to be migrated when moving a Smart Page
contents.description:
This story ensures data integrity when changing page hierarchy.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
Given a sub-Page is moved to become a standalone Page
When the move operation is completed
Then all child references, linked content, permissions, and dependencies are automatically migrated to the new hierarchy

contents.summary: PB - As a user, I want page URLs, breadcrumbs, and SEO metadata to update when Smart Page hierarchy changes
contents.description:
This story ensures external discoverability and navigation remain correct after hierarchy changes.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
Given a Smart Page's hierarchy changes
When the changes are saved
Then page URLs, breadcrumbs, navigation paths, and SEO metadata are automatically updated

contents.summary: PB - As an admin, I want audit logging and activity tracking for Smart Page hierarchy changes
contents.description:
This story provides an audit trail for administrative oversight.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
Given a Smart Page's hierarchy changes
When the changes are saved
Then audit logging and activity tracking records are generated for hierarchy changes and page movements

contents.summary: PB - As an Admin, I want to configure sub-page permissions in Admin -> Group
contents.description:
This story implements the core UI for managing sub-page permissions.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
Given I am in Admin -> Group -> Permission
When I view a parent page
Then I can see and configure sub-pages under parent pages in line with the resource folder/sub-folder design
And I can trigger permission propagation using the same logic as resource folder/sub-folders

contents.summary: PB - As an Admin, I want hierarchical permission inheritance for sub-pages
contents.description:
This story implements the inheritance model for sub-page permissions.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
Given I configure permissions for a parent page
When sub-pages exist under it
Then sub-pages inherit permissions hierarchically from their parent pages

contents.summary: PB - As an Admin, I want multi-level permission propagation for sub-pages
contents.description:
This story implements the ability to propagate permission changes down multiple levels of the page hierarchy.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
Given I change permissions on a parent page
When I trigger propagation
Then permission changes propagate down multiple levels of the sub-page hierarchy

contents.summary: PB - As an Admin, I want audit history for sub-page permission changes
contents.description:
This story provides traceability for all permission modifications.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
Given sub-page permissions are changed
When I view the audit log
Then the audit history records all sub-page permission updates

contents.summary: PB - As a Developer, I want sub-page permission updates to synchronize across platforms
contents.description:
This story ensures consistency of permissions across different client applications and APIs.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
Given sub-page permissions are updated
When I check different platforms (APIs, mobile, etc.)
Then permission updates are synchronized across all platforms

contents.summary: Grouped Resource Publish - As an Admin, I want global template inheritance for requester email notifications
contents.description:
This story implements the ability for requester email notification settings to inherit from global templates.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
Given global email templates are defined
When configuring requester email notifications
Then settings can inherit from global template definitions

contents.summary: Grouped Resource Publish - As an Admin, I want multilingual email generation for requester notifications
contents.description:
This story enables the system to send requester emails in multiple languages.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
Given multilingual settings are configured
When requester emails are sent
Then emails are generated in the recipient's preferred language

contents.summary: Grouped Resource Publish - As an Admin, I want tenant-level customization for requester email notifications
contents.description:
This story allows individual tenants to customize their requester email notification settings.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
Given I am an admin for a specific tenant
When configuring requester email notifications
Then I can apply tenant-level customizations that override global settings

contents.summary: Grouped Resource Publish - As an Admin, I want real-time delivery tracking for requester emails
contents.description:
This story provides visibility into the delivery status of requester emails.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
Given requester emails are sent
When I check the notification logs
Then I can see real-time delivery tracking information for each email

contents.summary: Grouped Resource Publish - As an Admin, I want approval workflows for requester email notification settings
contents.description:
This story integrates changes to notification settings with an approval process.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
Given I propose a change to requester email notification settings
When approval workflows are configured
Then the setting change requires approval before being applied

contents.summary: Grouped Resource Publish - As a Developer, I want requester email notifications to synchronize with external/legacy systems
contents.description:
This story ensures consistency of notification settings and delivery across integrated systems.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
Given requester email notification settings are updated
When external/legacy systems are integrated
Then notification settings and delivery status synchronize with these systems

contents.summary: As a user, I want an optional checkbox to remove facial data during MCP Site cloning (UI)
contents.description:
This story covers the user interface element for the optional facial data removal during site cloning.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
Given I am cloning an MCP Site
When I am presented with cloning options
Then I see an optional checkbox labeled 'Remove existing facial data and related flags'
And ticking/unticking the checkbox correctly reflects the user's choice

contents.summary: As a developer, I want backend logic to remove facial data during MCP Site cloning
contents.description:
This story covers the backend implementation for the complete removal of facial data and related flags during site cloning when the option is selected.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
Given an MCP Site is being cloned with the 'remove facial data' option selected
When the cloning process executes
Then all existing facial data and related flags are completely and securely removed from the cloned site's database

contents.summary: As an Admin, I want facial data to be removed during MCP Site cloning so that cloned sites comply with privacy regulations
contents.description:
In order to ensure cloned sites comply with privacy regulations, as an Admin, I want facial data to be automatically removed during the MCP Site cloning process.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
Given an MCP Site is cloned with the 'remove facial data' option selected
When the cloning process completes successfully
Then no facial data or related flags are present in the cloned site's database or asset metadata
And the cloned site functions correctly without data corruption

contents.summary: As an admin, I want notifications for Azure image tagging usage
contents.description:
This story provides alerts and notifications related to Azure image tagging service status and limits.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
Given Azure image tagging is active
When processing limits are approached or exceeded
Then I receive notifications (e.g., email, in-app alert)
And I receive notifications for quota exhaustion and provider failures

contents.summary: As a developer, I want APIs updated to support Azure image tagging for asset discoverability
contents.description:
In order to drive asset discoverability through AI, as a developer, I want the platform APIs updated to allow submitting images for Azure AI tagging and retrieving the generated tags.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
Given an image is uploaded and processed for Azure tagging
When I query the `/api/assets/{assetId}/tags` endpoint
Then the API response includes the Azure-generated image tags in a structured format

Given an image is submitted for re-tagging via the `/api/assets/{assetId}/retag` endpoint
When the re-tagging process completes successfully
Then the updated Azure-generated tags are available via the `/api/assets/{assetId}/tags` endpoint

contents.summary: As a developer, I want permissions configured for Azure image tagging to control access to AI features
contents.description:
In order to ensure appropriate access control for AI features, as a developer, I want role-based permissions configured for Azure image tagging functionality.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
Given I am logged in as an 'Admin' user
When I navigate to the 'Asset Intelligence Settings' page
Then I can see and modify Azure image tagging configuration settings (e.g., enable/disable tagging, configure confidence thresholds)

Given I am logged in as a 'Standard User'
When I view an asset's details page
Then I can see the Azure-generated image tags for that asset

Given I am logged in as a 'Standard User'
When I attempt to modify Azure image tagging configuration settings
Then I am prevented from doing so and an appropriate error message is displayed

contents.summary: As a support engineer, I want comprehensive documentation for Azure image tagging so that I can efficiently troubleshoot and assist users
contents.description:
In order to enable efficient troubleshooting and user assistance, as a support engineer, I want all relevant documentation and rollout configurations for Azure image tagging functionality to be updated and easily accessible in the internal knowledge base.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
Given I am a support engineer
When I need to troubleshoot an Azure image tagging issue
Then I can find a dedicated section in the internal knowledge base that covers common issues, configurations, and troubleshooting steps for Azure image tagging
And the documentation accurately reflects the current implementation and configuration options for Azure image tagging

contents.summary: As a user, I want to undo/redo Smart Page hierarchy changes
contents.description:
This story provides the functionality to undo and redo modifications made to the Smart Page hierarchy.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
Given I have made changes to Smart Page hierarchy
When I perform an undo action
Then the hierarchy reverts to its previous state
When I perform a redo action
Then the hierarchy reapplies the undone change

contents.summary: As a user, I want to view version history for Smart Page hierarchy changes
contents.description:
This story provides the ability to view a historical log of all changes made to the Smart Page hierarchy.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
Given I am viewing a Smart Page
When I access the version history feature
Then I can view a full page hierarchy version history for all move operations, including who made the change and when

contents.summary: As an admin, I want notifications for impacted users when Smart Page hierarchy changes
contents.description:
This story ensures that users affected by Smart Page hierarchy changes receive appropriate notifications.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
Given a Smart Page's hierarchy changes are saved
When there are impacted users
Then notifications are triggered and sent to these users (e.g., email, in-app alert)

contents.summary: As an admin, I want workflow updates for impacted users when Smart Page hierarchy changes
contents.description:
This story ensures that relevant workflows are updated for users impacted by Smart Page hierarchy changes.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
Given a Smart Page's hierarchy changes are saved
When there are impacted users with active workflows
Then their workflows are automatically updated to reflect the new hierarchy (e.g., routing, access permissions)

contents.summary: As an admin, I want role-based permissions for Smart Page restructuring
contents.description:
This story implements role-based access control for operations related to Smart Page hierarchy restructuring.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
Given a Smart Page's hierarchy changes are proposed
When I have appropriate roles
Then I can apply role-based permissions to control who can initiate, modify, or approve restructuring operations

contents.summary: As an admin, I want approval workflows for Smart Page restructuring
contents.description:
This story integrates approval workflows for changes to the Smart Page hierarchy.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
Given a Smart Page's hierarchy changes are proposed
When approval workflows are configured
Then changes require approval based on defined workflow rules before being applied

contents.summary: As a developer, I want Smart Page hierarchy updates to synchronize across the Smart Page API for consistent data access
contents.description:
In order to ensure consistent data access for Smart Pages, as a developer, I want Smart Page hierarchy updates to be immediately reflected in the `/api/smartpages` endpoint.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
Given a Smart Page hierarchy is updated (e.g., a sub-page is moved or reordered) and saved
When I make a GET request to `/api/smartpages/{smartPageId}`
Then the API response for that Smart Page accurately reflects the new hierarchy structure
And the hierarchy update is reflected in the API response within 500ms of being saved

contents.summary: As a developer, I want Smart Page hierarchy updates to synchronize across responsive web views for mobile users
contents.description:
In order to ensure a consistent user experience on mobile devices, as a developer, I want Smart Page hierarchy updates to be immediately reflected in the responsive web views accessed by mobile clients.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
Given a Smart Page hierarchy is updated (e.g., a sub-page is moved or reordered) and saved
When I access the Smart Page via a mobile browser (e.g., Chrome on Android, Safari on iOS)
Then the responsive web view accurately displays the new hierarchy structure upon page refresh or re-navigation
And the hierarchy update is reflected in the responsive web view within 2 seconds of being saved

contents.summary: As a developer, I want Smart Page hierarchy updates to synchronize across CSV and JSON exports for data integrity
contents.description:
In order to maintain data integrity and consistency, as a developer, I want Smart Page hierarchy updates to be correctly reflected in all Smart Page data exports (e.g., CSV, JSON).

**Acceptance Criteria:**
Given a Smart Page hierarchy is updated (e.g., a sub-page is moved or reordered) and saved
When I generate a CSV export of Smart Page data
Then the CSV export accurately represents the new hierarchy structure for all included Smart Pages

Given a Smart Page hierarchy is updated (e.g., a sub-page is moved or reordered) and saved
When I generate a JSON export of Smart Page data
Then the JSON export accurately represents the new hierarchy structure for all included Smart Pages

contents.summary: As a developer, I want Smart Page hierarchy updates to synchronize across collaborative editing sessions
contents.description:
This story ensures that Smart Page hierarchy updates are consistently reflected in real-time collaborative editing sessions.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
Given a Smart Page's hierarchy changes are saved
When multiple users are in a collaborative editing session
Then hierarchy updates are synchronized in real-time across all participants

contents.summary: As an admin, I want to view core usage analytics for Azure image tagging
contents.description:
As an admin, I want to see visual representations of the fundamental usage metrics for the Azure image tagging service, such as the total number of images processed and the volume of API calls, so that I can monitor overall service adoption and activity.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
Given Azure image tagging is active
When I view the analytics dashboard
Then I see visual representations of the number of images processed
And I see visual representations of the number of API calls made

contents.summary: As an admin, I want to view performance and error rate analytics for Azure image tagging
contents.description:
As an admin, I want to see visual representations of the operational performance and error rates of the Azure image tagging service, so that I can identify and address issues promptly.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
Given Azure image tagging is active
When I view the analytics dashboard
Then I see visual representations of the success rates of image tagging operations
And I see visual representations of the failure rates of image tagging operations

contents.summary: As an admin, I want to generate on-demand reports for Azure image tagging usage
contents.description:
As an admin, I want the ability to generate and export detailed reports on Azure image tagging usage and provider activity whenever needed, so that I can get immediate insights into service performance.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
Given Azure image tagging is active
When I request an on-demand report
Then I can generate and export detailed reports on image-tagging usage and provider activity

contents.summary: As a user, I want automated export and synchronization for the Asset Intelligence report
contents.description:
As a user, I want the Asset Intelligence report to be automatically generated, exported to a specified location, and synchronized with external reporting systems, so that I have up-to-date data available in all relevant platforms without manual effort.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
Given the `weekly_asset_intelligence_report` is generated
When automated export and synchronization are configured
Then the report is automatically exported to a specified location or format
And the report data is automatically synchronized across specified reporting systems

contents.summary: As a user, I want multi-environment aggregation for the Asset Intelligence report
contents.description:
This story enables the report to consolidate data from various environments.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
Given the `weekly_asset_intelligence_report` is generated
When data exists across multiple environments
Then the report correctly aggregates data from all specified environments

contents.summary: PB - As an Admin, I want approval workflows for sub-page permission updates
contents.description:
This story integrates permission changes with approval processes.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
Given I propose a change to sub-page permissions
When approval workflows are configured
Then the permission update requires approval before being applied

contents.summary: Grouped Resource Publish - As an Admin, I want to configure grouped email notification settings in workflow templates
contents.description:
This story implements the core UI for enabling and configuring grouped email notifications.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
Given the MCP development setting is enabled
When 'Enable Grouped Requests' is enabled in Admin > Workflow for a Resource Publish Workflow Template
Then additional notification options appear when User Notifications is set to 'Select'

contents.summary: As a User, I want to use Bulk Apply functionality for updates through Grouped work (Core UI/UX)
contents.description:
This story covers the core user interface and experience for the Bulk Apply functionality.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
Given I am on the Grouped Review page
When I select multiple items
Then the 'Apply' button displays the correct item count and tooltip text for enabled/disabled states
And snackbar notifications are displayed for apply actions

contents.summary: As a User, I want Bulk Apply to perform specific validation checks for Grouped work
contents.description:
This story covers the implementation of additional validation checks required for the Bulk Apply workflow.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
Given I am using Bulk Apply for Grouped work
When I attempt to apply updates
Then additional validation checks specific to this workflow are performed
And appropriate error messages are displayed if validation fails

contents.summary: As a User, I want Bulk Apply to determine actions based on request types (staged/standalone)
contents.description:
This story covers the logic for determining 'Complete Request' and 'Stage' actions within Bulk Apply based on the nature of the requests.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
Given I am using Bulk Apply for Grouped work
When I apply updates
Then 'Complete Request' and 'Stage' actions are correctly determined based on whether requests are staged, their current stage status, or standalone requests

contents.summary: As an admin, I want to schedule automated reports for Azure image tagging usage
contents.description:
As an admin, I want the ability to configure and schedule automated delivery of detailed reports on Azure image tagging usage and provider activity, so that I receive regular updates without manual intervention.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
Given Azure image tagging is active
When I configure a scheduled report
Then the report is automatically generated and delivered at the specified intervals
